title: Sun Pharmaceutical is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Sun Pharmaceutical is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Sun Pharmaceutical has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sun Pharmaceutical:
Sun Pharmaceutical is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sun Pharmaceutical!
